evidence.text: Added explicit ownership matrix, consumed S/S-prime substrate matrix, no-ambient registry, inheritance register, and first-execution sequence to Idea/Bimba/Seeds/M/Legacy/plans/2026-06-02-m-prime-cycle-2-canonical/00-overview-and-m-prime-first-coverage.md; references tracks 01-14 directly and was verified by VAK CLI plus assessor reset and rendered doc inspection.

Cycle 1 substrate inheritance registry expanded in Idea/Bimba/Seeds/M/Legacy/plans/2026-06-02-m-prime-cycle-2-canonical/00-overview-and-m-prime-first-coverage.md with per-surface classifications for S0/S0', S1/S1', S2/S2', S3/S3', S4/S4', S5/S5', Pratibimba shell/runtime, Body/M/epi-tauri migration evidence, and Track 13 continuation; explicit anti-greenfield rule added. Verification: every cycle 2 track markdown contains a Cycle 1 substrate inheritance line; greenfield/rebuild scan shows only guardrail language, not major S/S' greenfield claims.

M' First Execution Sequence defined and load-bearing in 00-overview-and-m-prime-first-coverage.md lines 147-158 (00 guardrails -> 01 runtime -> 02-07 subsystem surfaces -> 08/09 integrated plugins -> 07.T4/10 mediation+agent ontology -> 11/12/13 consumed-substrate closure -> 14 no-orphan audit); anti-greenfield forbidden at line 157 and guardrail table line 107; S/S' kept dependency-driven/subordinate. Verification: m-dev-plan-assess.mjs --route --write --json returns route ['00.T2','02.T1','04.T0','01.T2'] leading with M' ownership tracks (00/M0/M2/shell), not substrate-closure tracks 11/12/13.

Substrate-truth assessment: Idea/Pratibimba/System is already the active Theia executable home, Body/M/epi-tauri is already marked migration-source-only, and the tranche has been narrowed in the track doc to the real remaining gap: runtime-boundary lock-in, epi app launch-path rewiring, runnable Electron verification, and single kernel-bridge/gateway authority proof.

Runtime-boundary lock-in complete: 6/6 contract tests pass (Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/test/kernel-bridge-theia-boundary.test.mjs + shared-bridge-fan-out.test.mjs) proving single Theia frontend/backend kernel-bridge + single SharedBridgeAdapter fan-out to six M-extensions; epi-cli launch-path targets Idea/Pratibimba/System/electron-app (Body/S/S0/epi-cli/src/app/mod.rs:89) with electron-main.js (19KB) + 18 extension lib/ outputs built; Body/M/epi-tauri/DEPRECATED.md + M5' canon §2 already canonise Theia as THE shell.

Runtime-boundary lock-in complete: 6/6 contract tests pass (Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/test/kernel-bridge-theia-boundary.test.mjs + shared-bridge-fan-out.test.mjs) proving single Theia frontend/backend kernel-bridge + single SharedBridgeAdapter fan-out to six M-extensions; epi-cli launch-path targets Idea/Pratibimba/System/electron-app (Body/S/S0/epi-cli/src/app/mod.rs:89) with electron-main.js (19KB) + 18 extension lib/ outputs built; Body/M/epi-tauri/DEPRECATED.md + M5' canon §2 already canonise Theia as THE shell.

0/1 daily + deep-IDE layout and state-preserving switch landed in shell extensions and pinned in M'-SYSTEM-SPEC.md (lines 87/100/139/149 daily-vs-4+2 boundary, parent-face discipline, OmniPanel / operator transparency) and M'-PORTAL-SPEC.md (57/59 surface separation 1=flow,/=operator,4+2=depth). Verification: node --test body-daily-vertical-slice.test.mjs + track-08-integrated-layout-contract.test.mjs + activation-and-persistence.test.mjs passed 33/33 (Steps 5-7 prove switch preserves sessionKey/DAY-NOW/profileGeneration/coordinate both directions = deep IDE summon/return; single upstream subscription across both layouts; recast guard keeps 0/1 owned by Theia extensions not Body/M/epi-tauri).

OmniPanel operator catalog (chat/channels/sessions/nodes/models/skills/cron/logs/config/debug with per-layout visibility) + CrossLayoutIntent deep-link envelope landed in omnipanel-shell extension and Body/S/S0/epi-cli/src/gate/omnipanel.rs; membrane discipline (/ as S0' command/config/readiness centre, not 4+2 replacement / not pseudo-ACR vs M5-4') pinned in M'-PORTAL-SPEC.md (39,57,100-106,140,187). Verification: cargo test gate_omnipanel_contract 2/2 (contract surfaces + rust_manifest_covers_required_methods_declared_by_electron_panel_parity = command parity vs gateway/S0 route tables); deep-link/layout routing covered by activation-and-persistence.test.mjs within the 33/33 layout batch. Note: gate_omnipanel_contract.rs reads panelRpcParity.ts via a cross-repo absolute path (/Users/admin/Documents/Epi-Logos/...) while local copies exist under omnipanel-shell + Body/S/S3/epi-app -- pre-existing S0-lane fragility, passes today.

Shell 0 structural/cosmic parent face over M1/M2/M3 outputs landed (plugin-integrated-1-2-3 + cosmic-engine slice, now under Body/M/epi-theia/extensions after Pratibimba/System->epi-theia migration). Specs pin all deliverables: M'-PORTAL-SPEC 38/55/66/123 (integrated preview, lean current-coordinate, M0' not swallowed = selected-coordinate orientation only) + M'-SYSTEM-SPEC 83 ('open the app, see the state of things' lean surface). Verification: node --test cosmic-engine-slice + jiva-siva-slice 18/18 (integrated 1-2-3 preview); m2-parashakti-meaning-packet + m3-mahamaya-codon-wheel 13/13 (shell-0 surface vs live profile/runtime payloads); M1 7/7 prior.

M0 readable graph / summonable inspector substrate already landed and verified: Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/m0-anuttara implements buildM0InspectorModel/normalizeM0CoordinateInput over S2-provenanced graph payloads, and Idea/Bimba/Seeds/M/M0'/M0'-SPEC.md defines readable-default vs technical-inspector boundaries. Verification: node --test Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/test/m0-anuttara-inspector.test.mjs passed 6/6; cargo test --manifest-path Body/S/S2/graph-services/Cargo.toml --test graph_api_contract live_m0_inspector_payload_reads_anuttara_fields_from_s2_properties -- --ignored --nocapture passed 1/1 after graph-services build.

M0 coordinate ground + source traceability + map-to-source navigation owned by S2/S1 and surfaced via provenanced node anchors (m0-inspector.ts reads anchors from graphNode, never hardcoded UI paths). Pinned in M0'-SPEC.md Backend Contract Consumed (S2 source traceability + new diagram/MOC residency-chain bullet: ARCHITECTURE-DIAGRAM-PACK -> World/{Name}.md -> World/Types/{Type}/{Type}.canvas, surfaced as provenanced anchors not renderer-local registry). Verification: cargo test graph-schema track_02_t1_convergence 5/5 + code_provenance_properties 1/1 + coordinate_prefix_properties 4/4; node --test m0-anuttara-inspector.test.mjs 6/6 (backlinks/anchors resolve through S2 provenance, canonical-absence over placeholders).

S2 source traceability and coordinate ground payload added via graph_api source_traceability_anchors + node anchors and M0' residency-chain contract; verification: cargo test --manifest-path Body/S/S2/graph-services/Cargo.toml --test graph_api_contract passed 6/6 non-ignored tests (2 live Neo4j tests ignored), covering source-traceability payload, coordinate canonicalization, graph contract anchors, pointer web, and kernel resonance.

Anuttara symbol/formulation rendering owned in M0 (m0-inspector.ts languageFields read symbol/formulation_type/complete_formulation from S2 node properties, canonical-absence not placeholders) and tied to S2 truth (c_1_symbol/c_1_formulation_type/c_1_complete_formulation canonical on C1, no duplicated UI registry). Pinned in M0'-SPEC.md 'Anuttara As Pre-Math Node Language' (graph view reads properties, does not invent them; missing field = readiness/provenance state). Verification: node --test m0-anuttara-inspector.test.mjs 6/6 (incl. 'missing Anuttara syntax fields render as canonical absence, not placeholders'); cargo test graph-schema track_02_t1_convergence anuttara_language_node_properties_are_canonical_on_c1 within 5/5.

M1 played-traversal surface (played coordinate=pitch, relation=interval, traversal=phrase, audible/visible character) landed in m1-paramasiva extension and pinned in M1'-SPEC.md (35-37 walk-as-melody, 41 never-invents-pitch sourced from MathemeHarmonicProfile, 68-71 torus/traversal-timeline/route-preview, 78-80 S2 relation law + S3 temporal projection). Verification: node --test m1-paramasiva-clock-instrument.test.mjs passed 7/7 — relation walk blocked until S2 typed harmonic descriptors present (graph truth), preserves exact profile Hz + Klein source event on tritone flip (audible character), topology inspector reads from profile payload (profile-to-ui), no frontend substrate-law numeric constants.

MathemeHarmonicProfile -> M1 runtime/performance mapping owned via Body/S/S0/portal-core/src/harmonic_profile.rs + gate/kernel_bridge_runtime.rs profile stream; every required profile field defined in M1'-SPEC.md §4 (tick: tick12/degree720/degree360/su2Layer/phase/position6; harmonic: ratio role/audio_octet[8]/nodal_quartet[4]) plus the MPrimePerformanceEvent profile-to-performance stream (line 102). Verification: cargo test kernel_bridge_runtime_contract 7/7 + profile_cli_contract 6/6 (profile stream vs live payloads); node --test m1-paramasiva-clock-instrument + shared-bridge-fan-out + kernel-bridge-theia-boundary 13/13 (M1 bridge consumer). Note: one transient compile collision (candidate_from_parashakti_meaning_packet) from concurrent 04.T0 edit cleared on re-run.

M1 profile-to-performance stream landed: S0 kernel_bridge_runtime now publishes S0.kernel-bridge.m1-profile-to-performance via m1_performance_event_from_profile using real portal_core::MathemeHarmonicProfile fields (tick, harmonic/audio_octet/nodal_quartet, pointerAnchor, diatonic, depositionAnchor, lensMode) with rendererDerivationAllowed=false; S3 Graphiti kernel-profile observation metadata now preserves metadata.profile_to_performance_stream for M1'/Paramasiva; M1'-SPEC.md names the concrete S0/S3 contract. Verification: cargo test --manifest-path Body/S/S0/epi-cli/Cargo.toml --test kernel_bridge_runtime_contract passed 8/8; cargo test --manifest-path Body/S/S3/gateway/Cargo.toml --test graphiti_runtime_contract passed 6/6. GitNexus impact: KernelBridgeRuntime LOW, kernel_profile_observation_deposit_payload CRITICAL direct S3/gateway path handled additively with contract coverage; post-cleanup detect_changes medium aggregate due shared active worktree lanes.

M2PrimeMeaningPacket and S5 user surface landed: Body/S/S5/epii-autoresearch-core now builds a strict backend-derived M2PrimeMeaningPacket from persisted Parashakti profile reports, Body/S/S5/epii-agent-core exposes it on m2_meaning_packet workbench candidate details, and Idea/Bimba/Seeds/M/M2'/M2'-SPEC.md names the S5 non-derivation boundary; verification passed cargo test --manifest-path Body/S/S5/epii-autoresearch-core/Cargo.toml (58/58) and cargo test --manifest-path Body/S/S5/epii-agent-core/Cargo.toml (12/12), with targeted profile/user-surface tests 5/5 and 9/9.

M3 clock-cosmos primary surface now binds the shared S3 world_clock stream: m3-mahamaya buildM3ProjectionSurface carries s3_world_clock_bound state with worldClockHandle, generation, source, subscriptionMode, tick, and degree720 into observability payloads and the M3-5 double-torus world-clock view; readiness blocks with authority_payload_missing when S3 world_clock tick/degree720 diverges from the current kernel profile, preventing a renderer-private clock fork. M3'-SPEC.md documents the concrete binding and drift policy. Verification: pnpm --dir Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/m3-mahamaya build passed; node --test Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/test/m3-mahamaya-codon-wheel.test.mjs passed 7/7 including S3 world_clock generation binding and drift-blocking coverage. GitNexus impact: buildM3ProjectionSurface LOW; detect_changes HIGH aggregate due shared dirty S0/S2/S5 lanes, with expected M3 BuildM3ProjectionSurface flows covered by the focused contract.

Full 472-state modal-inversion landscape + bidirectional (lens,mode)<->(codon,rotation) mapping owned by backend (portal-core/src/codon_rotation_projection.rs §7 map) and rendered by m3-mahamaya (Body/M/epi-theia); backend-truth discipline (no UI-local codon/tarot/I-Ching tables) pinned in M3'-SPEC.md 24/41/51/78/99-100 (landscape+bidirectional) and 26/83/91 (no local mapping generation). Verification: node --test m3-mahamaya-codon-wheel 7/7 (incl. '40x7+24x8=472', 'same profile -> same backend codon projection', 'no frontend authority tables'); cargo test portal-core codon 6/6 + codon_rotation_lut_materializes_the_472_state_surface + resonance codon-charge; C test_m3_codon_class 32/32.

M4 Journal/Daily/Dream/Oracle/flow-editor/highlight-rail surfaces owned (m4-nara extension under Body/M/epi-theia); shell 1 flow as universal CT0 lived input, FLOW-primary vs 'day container is not the daily note' (CT4b artifact), shell-preview-vs-4+2 depth all pinned in M4'-SPEC.md (37-38 surfaces, 83 shell-1 entry, 265 day-container/daily-note distinction, 73/240 preview-vs-depth). Verification: node --test m4-nara-day-container + jiva-siva-slice 16/16 incl. 'creates real Nara artifact files and renders DayContainer tree from persisted store' = flow-to-artifact against real temp vault/dayId/NOW paths (no mocks); jiva-siva = shell-1 4-5-0 recognition preview.

Integrated 1-2-3 plugin composition contract (M1/M2/M3 shared state, readiness, provenance) owned in Body/M/epi-theia/extensions plugin-integrated-1-2-3 + integrated-composition; pinned in M'-SYSTEM-SPEC.md 514 ('plugins compose layers; they do not rewrite layer canon') + 100 (shell 0 integrated parent-level preview of M1/M2/M3). Verification: node --test validate-composition-contract-preflight + track-08-contribution-contract + integrated-state-coordinator + integrated-plugin-arbitration 27/27; cosmic-engine-slice + jiva-siva-slice 18/18 prior. Note: M'-SYSTEM-SPEC lines 45/528 still cite Idea/Pratibimba/System paths now stale post epi-theia migration (track-13 spec-maintenance, not 08.T0 scope).

S0 consumed contract closure: M' Shell Consumed Contract Closure section added to Idea/Bimba/Seeds/S/S0/S0-SPEC.md and Idea/Bimba/Seeds/S/S0/S0'/S0'-SPEC.md pinning the 5 consumed categories (profile, readiness, command dispatch, bridge status, bounded execution) through KernelBridgeAPI/invokeCapability; shell-1 (body-lite-surface intent-only) vs / (omnipanel-shell capability dispatch) separation documented with privacy-class forbidden-fields scan as negative-test floor; 29/29 tests pass (Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/body-lite-surface/tests/body-lite-surface.test.mjs + kernel-bridge-theia-boundary.test.mjs + shared-bridge-fan-out.test.mjs). No still-missing shell-breaking gaps at this tranche scope.

S3 consumed contract closure: M' Shell Consumed Contract Closure section added to Idea/Bimba/Seeds/S/S3/S3-SPEC.md and Idea/Bimba/Seeds/S/S3/S3'/S3'-SPEC.md pinning the consumed surfaces (gateway handshake, capability dispatch, bridge status, profile mirror, SpaceTimeDB shared-cosmos subscriptions for world_clock/pratibimba_presence/shared_archetype_event, s3'.temporal.context for /body+shell-1 payload anchoring); single S3 WebSocket via createGatewayWebSocket(EPI_GATEWAY_URL) verified by 6/6 contract tests at Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/test/kernel-bridge-theia-boundary.test.mjs + shared-bridge-fan-out.test.mjs; body-lite-surface temporal context fields enumerated (BODY_DEEP_LINK_CONTEXT_FIELDS). Reconnect/resubscribe lifecycle closed via single fan-out + stale-replay. No M' consumption integration blockers; S3 dispatch home extraction remains future S3 closure work.

S4 consumed contract closure: M' Shell Consumed Contract Closure section added to Idea/Bimba/Seeds/S/S4/S4-SPEC.md and Idea/Bimba/Seeds/S/S4/S4'/S4'-SPEC.md pinning M5-4 (Agentic Control Room) consumed surfaces (capability matrix tree via parseCapabilityMatrix from Body/S/S4/plugins/pleroma/capability-matrix.json, s4'.mediation.route via invokeCapability, s4'.mediation.capabilities.list, constitutional actor set {anima,aletheia,pi,sophia,epii,human}, enforceHumanGate, evidence envelope to s5'.review.submit); ACR contract suite 8/8 pass (run-flow.test.mjs + evidence-envelope.test.mjs + human-gate.test.mjs); 18/19 agentic-mediation-e2e total. RECORDED OUT-OF-SCOPE FINDING: extensions/test/agentic-mediation-e2e/harness.mjs:43-47 references s5BaselineFixture at docs/plans/... but the file moved to Idea/Bimba/Seeds/M/Legacy/plans/2026-05-31-mprime-and-sprime-implementation-tracks/plan.runs/10-t2-s5-review-baseline-20260602T000502Z.json during seed-legacy migration; needs Pratibimba-side test-harness path rebase (Track 13 or dedicated rebase tranche).

S5 consumed contract closure: M' Shell Consumed Contract Closure / M' Consumed Surface Closure sections added to Idea/Bimba/Seeds/S/S5/S5-SPEC.md and Idea/Bimba/Seeds/S/S5/S5'/S5'-SPEC.md pinning consumed review inbox, autoresearch dry-run promotion, Epii deposit/status, Gnosis/kbase, epi-logos pedagogy, and shell review-alert badge surfaces; explicit blockers recorded for provider-backed Epii invocation, gateway routing beyond review/improve/epii, production Gnosis convergence, non-dry-run promotion, and typed M' API. Verification: node --test Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/test/m5-epii-review-surface.test.mjs Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/test/privacy-audit/forbidden-fields.test.mjs passed 8/8; python3 -m pytest Body/S/S5/tests/test_epii_agent_contract.py passed 5/5.

rationale: Simulated each selected task as done before choosing the next task, so downstream dependencies can enter the route.
Capped the route at 4 task(s) with total effort weight 8/8 unless fewer tasks were available.
